Chronic Conditions & Health Indicators (CDC PLACES)

Source: CDC PLACES County-Level Data. Values are age-adjusted or crude prevalence estimates.

Related Entities

  • hospital CONEMAUGH MEMORIAL MEDICAL CENTER 2-star overall rating
  • hospital CONEMAUGH MINERS MEDICAL CENTER
  • snf HERITAGE RIDGE SENIOR LIVING AT JOHNSTOWN 1-star, 63 beds
  • snf HAIDA NURSING AND REHAB 2-star, 98 beds
  • snf RICHLAND NURSING AND REHAB 3-star, 97 beds
  • snf HILLTOP HEIGHTS HEALTH & REHAB CENTER 1-star, 120 beds
  • snf Maple Heights Health & Rehab Center, LLC 1-star, 301 beds
  • snf ARBUTUS PARK MANOR 3-star, 141 beds
  • snf MAPLE WINDS HEALTHCARE AND REHABILITATION, LLC 2-star, 50 beds
  • snf CONEMAUGH MEMORIAL MEDICAL CENTER TCU 5-star, 30 beds
  • snf QUALITY LIFE SERVICES - WESTMONT 2-star, 41 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
